description_long: This is a rectangular, yeast-raised donut generously coated with a thick layer of white icing on its upper surface. The icing appears smooth and slightly glossy, with some unevenness and drips along the edges, suggesting a hand-applied finish. The donut itself is golden-brown, with a soft, pillowy texture visible at the exposed ends and base. There are no visible toppings or decorations beyond the icing, and the donut's surface is mostly uniform except for some minor cracks and folds in the icing. The overall appearance is that of a classic bakery-style iced donut, likely sweet and soft inside. The donut is unwrapped and shown isolated against a plain background.
description: A rectangular, golden-brown donut with a thick, smooth layer of white icing on top. The icing is slightly glossy and uneven, with no visible toppings or packaging.
description_view_0: The donut is seen from above, highlighting the broad, smooth expanse of white icing covering most of the top surface.
description_view_1: The donut is viewed from one short end, showing the thickness of the icing and the soft, airy interior of the pastry.
description_view_2: A side view reveals the length of the donut and the way the icing drapes over the edges, with some minor cracks and folds.
description_view_3: The opposite end view displays the rounded, slightly irregular edge of the donut and the way the icing pools and thickens at the corner.
attribute_icing_type: Thick white sugar icing, smooth and slightly glossy with some uneven drips and folds.
